rulings.Case Title: VIVIAN SU VS. 1314 POLK STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Re Arbitration; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion Re Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for oct 29, 2018 line 3. PLAINTIFF VIVIAN SU's Motion Re Arbitration DENIED in part and moot in part. Motion to vacate order compelling arbitration is denied; motion to appoint and arbitration is denied, moot, parties have agreed on an arbitrator. Arbitration to proceed in January 2019 on the date(s) provided by the arbitrator. = (501/REQ)
